title: Better Minecraft Worlds
description: A simple ModPack trying to give the best Vanilla/Survival Experience for the players and demonstrate what Minecraft can be with a couple of improvements.
body:
![nuevo titulo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abfbc663a45627a5fc6f49f9daf8066f743b2062.png)

### This mod pack was created with passion for the players and by a player in the community with more than 10 years living and seeing the game change over the years.

## Info And More
Modification and improvement of this pack of mods is allowed with their respective creation credits to the original and respecting the creators of the mods present in this pack.

### To consider:
Consider that one of the mods **(Distant Horizons)** is still in the development and improvement phase, there may be bugs or crashes at certain points
Please make me highlight this information to the corresponding developers of the mod or to the creator of these.

### Last but important
_This pack of mods was created as a hobby, there may or may not be updates to these in the future.
Community improvement help is also accepted to maintain this pack of mods for all of us who enjoy Minecraft._

In case you want to communicate information about the mod pack directly to DM on [my personal Twitter](https://twitter.com/lucasbiggs28) _(or as they call it now X)_
